v0.1.0.description:
Initial release for the Zelda CD-i and Archipelago discords. Has most of the content up to and including the first shrine, minus some visual stuff like menu assets and cutscenes.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/compare/v0.0.4...v0.1.0
v0.1.0.title: v0.1.0 - ShrineOfArchipelago

v0.1.1.description: ## Game changes * Hid the debug text behind a debug toggle * The ruby HUD icon now turns yellow when connected to the AP server APWorld remains unchanged from 0.1.0! **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/compare/v0.1.0...v0.1.1
v0.1.1.title: v0.1.1 - YellowRuby

v0.1.2.description: ## What's Changed * Feature: stylized archipelago pickup sprite courtesy of Spectremint by @nebbii in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/95 * Feature: Clean up archipelago config screen and add password field by @nebbii in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/100 * Fix: Make Llort reward 250 rubies on defeat by @sshrrutiiii in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/101 ## New Contributors * @sshrrutiiii made their first contribution in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/101 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/compare/v0.1.1...v0.1.2
v0.1.2.title: v0.1.2 - SpectremintsAdventure

v0.1.3.description:
## What's Changed
* fix(ap) sync the inventory after initially loading a save by @nebbii in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/105
* fix(ap) remove double connect initialization to let the game disconnect properly by @nebbii in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/106
* feat(zelda) rework pushback negation, zelda can always walk off screens now by @nebbii in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/107
* fix(npc) make voice lines pause instead of stop to avoid skipping by @nebbii in https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/pull/108


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nebbii/za-gdx/compare/v0.1.2...v0.1.3
v0.1.3.title: v0.1.3 - TalkyNpcs
